ddls:
CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "sol_id" INTEGER /* Identifier associated with the session or operation log */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation performed (e.g., Move, Verify) */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target of the operation (e.g., rebook, seat) */,
  "to" TEXT /* Destination of the operation */,
  "where" TEXT /* Location where the operation is executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the operation (e.g., In Progress, Completed, Failed) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the operation (e.g., Maintenance, Rebooking) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_to FOREIGN KEY ("to") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_operation_type FOREIGN KEY ("operation_type") REFERENCES operation_types ("operation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_target FOREIGN KEY ("target") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_sol_id FOREIGN KEY ("sol_id") REFERENCES sessions ("sol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "sol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the operational session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the operational session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session was initiated */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operations staff, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node (e.g., New-Node_vszyaptgyu) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the node within the airline infrastructure */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., Terminal, Gate, Hangar) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the node (e.g., number of seats, number of aircraft) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the node (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., Seat, Station) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target's functionality or purpose */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the target (e.g., Available, Unavailable) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the target (e.g., number of seats, number of passengers) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_types" (
  "operation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for operation type */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation (e.g., Move, Verify) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the operation entails */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation related to the log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("sol_id")
)
